sub_groupings.name: Allergic and Hypersensitivity Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions resulting from allergic reactions or hypersensitivity responses in the skin

sub_groupings.name: Autoimmune and Inflammatory Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions involving immune-mediated inflammation or autoimmune reactions in the skin

sub_groupings.name: Congenital and Developmental Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions present at birth or related to developmental abnormalities of the skin

sub_groupings.name: Dermatological Manifestations of Systemic Diseases
sub_groupings.description: Skin conditions secondary to systemic or internal diseases

sub_groupings.name: Drug Reaction and Treatment-Related Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Skin conditions caused by medications or medical treatments

sub_groupings.name: Endocrine and Metabolic Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions related to hormonal or metabolic imbalances affecting the skin

sub_groupings.name: Fungal and Infectious Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions caused by infectious agents including fungi and viruses

sub_groupings.name: Inflammatory and Autoimmune Mucocutaneous Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions involving inflammation of both mucous membranes and skin

sub_groupings.name: Infectious and Post-Infectious Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions following or resulting from infectious processes

sub_groupings.name: Neoplastic and Proliferative Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions involving abnormal tissue growth or proliferation in the skin

sub_groupings.name: Neurogenic and Psychogenic Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions related to nervous system dysfunction or psychological factors

sub_groupings.name: Pigmentary and Color-Related Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions involving abnormal skin or mucosal pigmentation

sub_groupings.name: Post-Inflammatory and Reactive Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions following skin inflammation or injury

sub_groupings.name: Traumatic and Mechanical Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions resulting from physical trauma or mechanical forces

sub_groupings.name: Vascular and Circulatory Skin Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions related to blood vessels and circulation in the skin

sub_groupings.name: Other Dermatological Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Miscellaneous skin conditions not fitting other categories
